name: @loopover/rees
description: LoopOver review-enrichment service (REES) — heavy/external/historical PR analysis returned as a structured brief the review engine splices into the prompt. Deploys standalone on Railway; see #1473.

scripts.test: npm run build && npm run validate:sourcemaps && node scripts/generate-analyzer-metadata.mjs --check && (npm run test:node || npm run test:node)
